sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41840" key="e)porgia/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐποργιάζω</orth>, <sense id="n41840.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">revel in</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">among,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πόλεσσι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Anacreont.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13.23</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
